race.comment: MIDNIGHT DYNAMITE (6) exciting gelding chasing his fourth-straight victory. Sent north and made a mess of his rivals when leading throughout over 1350m at Doomben with the 61kg in C6 class. Has a few hurdles from the draw but looks to have the upside to overcome them. Go close. POINT AND SHOOT (3) talented gelding fourth-up for this and a win looks imminent. Went back from the gate and produced slick closing figures with an unlucky second over 1300m at Scone. Comes back a level and can finish over the top of these. COOL JAKEY (4) holding his form with the big weights and kept fresh for this. Set a fast early tempo and never surrendered with a tough third to Captain Furai over 1400m at this track last time out. Kept up to the mark with a trial win and sure to be around the money again. LUGH (11) returns from a lengthy break. Has excellent first-up credentials and looks ready to go after the two searching trials. MIGHTY ULYSSES (5) comes back in trip and can surprise at the big odds.
